queries.name: incoming_works_at
queries.cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[r:WORKS_AT]-(p:Person) RETURN c.id, p.id, r.since ORDER BY c.id, p.id

queries.name: incoming_located_in
queries.cypher: MATCH (city:City)<-[r:LOCATED_IN]-(c:Company) RETURN city.id, c.id, r.opened ORDER BY city.id, c.id

queries.name: incoming_company_employee_counts
queries.cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:WORKS_AT]-(p:Person) RETURN c.id, COUNT(*) AS cnt ORDER BY c.id

queries.name: incoming_city_chain
queries.cypher: MATCH (city:City)<-[:LOCATED_IN]-(c:Company)<-[:WORKS_AT]-(p:Person) RETURN city.id, c.id, p.id ORDER BY city.id, c.id, p.id

queries.name: multi_rel_company_counts
queries.cypher: MATCH (p:Person)-[:WORKS_AT|ADVISES]->(c:Company) RETURN c.id, COUNT(*) AS cnt ORDER BY c.id

queries.name: advised_company_people
queries.cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[r:ADVISES]-(p:Person) RETURN c.id, p.name, r.hours ORDER BY c.id, p.name

queries.name: incoming_with_endpoint_filter
queries.cypher: MATCH (c:Company)<-[:WORKS_AT]-(p:Person) WHERE c.revenue >= 1500 RETURN p.name, c.name ORDER BY p.name, c.name

queries.name: city_region_incoming_union
queries.cypher: MATCH (city:City)<-[:LOCATED_IN]-(c:Company)<-[:WORKS_AT|ADVISES]-(p:Person) WHERE city.region = 'south' RETURN p.name, c.name, city.name ORDER BY p.name, c.name
